case_title: STEN INGEMAR OLSSON VS. BAY QUACKERS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLSSON, STEN INGEMAR CONRAD AS TO DEFENDANT BAY QUACKERS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLSSON, STEN INGEMAR CONRAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY QUACKERS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $30,220.02 PRINCIPAL, $188.63 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,818.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BAY QUACKERS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
